translations.pt: Tenho um encontro daqui a pouco.
translations.hi: मेरी एक डेट जल्द ही है।
translations.ja: もうすぐデートがあります。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular nominative personal pronoun functioning as subject.
Finite main verb (1st sg, present indicative) selecting a direct object.
Temporal adverb meaning ‘soon/right away’, modifying the verb phrase.
Indefinite article; feminine accusative singular agreeing with the noun.
Common noun; feminine accusative singular functioning as direct object.

sentences.target: Sara vergisst unsere Verabredung schon wieder.

translations.de: Sara vergisst unsere Verabredung schon wieder.
translations.es: Sara vuelve a olvidar nuestra cita.
translations.it: Sara dimentica di nuovo il nostro appuntamento.
translations.zh-Hans: 萨拉又把我们的约会忘了。
translations.yue: 莎拉又唔記得我哋嘅約會。
translations.ru: Сара опять забывает о нашем свидании.
translations.pt: Sara esquece nosso encontro de novo.
translations.he: שרה שוב שוכחת את הדייט שלנו.
translations.vi: Sara lại quên buổi hẹn của chúng tôi.
translations.uk: Сара знову забуває про наше побачення.
translations.hi: सारा फिर से हमारी डेट भूल जाती है।
translations.pl: Sara znowu zapomina o naszej randce.
translations.el: Η Σάρα ξεχνά πάλι το ραντεβού μας.
translations.ro: Sara uită din nou întâlnirea noastră.
translations.cs: Sara zase zapomíná na naše rande.
translations.ja: サラはまた私たちのデートを忘れます。

tokens.explanation: Proper name; nominative singular subject.
Finite transitive verb (3rd sg, present indicative) taking a direct object.
Possessive determiner; feminine accusative singular agreeing with the noun.
Common noun; feminine accusative singular functioning as direct object.
Adverbial intensifier; part of the idiomatic sequence ‘schon wieder’.
Temporal adverb indicating repetition; combines with ‘schon’.

sentences.target: Unsere Verabredung fällt heute leider aus.

translations.de: Unsere Verabredung fällt heute leider aus.
translations.en: Our date is canceled today, unfortunately.
translations.es: Por desgracia, nuestra cita de hoy se canceló.
translations.fr: Notre rendez-vous d'aujourd'hui est malheureusement annulé.
translations.it: Purtroppo il nostro appuntamento di oggi è stato annullato.
translations.zh-Hans: 很遗憾，我们的约会今天取消了。
translations.yue: 可惜今日我哋嘅約會取消咗。
translations.ru: К сожалению, наше свидание сегодня отменили.
translations.pt: Infelizmente, nosso encontro de hoje foi cancelado.
translations.vi: Tiếc là buổi hẹn hôm nay bị hủy.
translations.nl: Onze date gaat vandaag helaas niet door.
translations.uk: На жаль, наше побачення сьогодні скасовано.
translations.hi: अफ़सोस, हमारी डेट आज रद्द हो गई।
translations.pl: Niestety nasza randka dziś jest odwołana.
translations.el: Δυστυχώς το ραντεβού μας σήμερα ακυρώθηκε.
translations.nb: Daten vår er dessverre avlyst i dag.
translations.id: Sayangnya, kencan kita hari ini batal.
translations.sv: Vår dejt är tyvärr inställd i dag.
translations.ro: Întâlnirea noastră de azi a fost anulată din păcate.
translations.cs: Naše rande je bohužel dnes zrušeno.
translations.da: Vores date er desværre aflyst i dag.
translations.ja: 残念ですが、今日のデートはキャンセルです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; feminine nominative singular agreeing with the subject noun.
Common noun; feminine nominative singular functioning as subject.
Finite verb (3rd sg, present); together with the particle ‘aus’ forms the separable verb ‘ausfallen’ (‘to be canceled’/‘to fail’).
Temporal adverb modifying the clause.
Modal adverb expressing speaker attitude.
Separable verbal particle; combines with ‘fällt’ to form ‘ausfallen’.

sentences.target: Wir haben eine Verabredung im neuen Café.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈhaːbən ˈaɪ̯nə fɛɐ̯ˈʔapʁeːdʊŋ ɪm ˈnɔʏ̯ən kaˈfeː/

translations.de: Wir haben eine Verabredung im neuen Café.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈhaːbən ˈaɪ̯nə fɛɐ̯ˈʔapʁeːdʊŋ ɪm ˈnɔʏ̯ən kaˈfeː/
translations.en: We have a date at the new café.
translations.es: Tenemos una cita en el café nuevo.
translations.fr: Nous avons un rendez-vous au nouveau café.
translations.it: Abbiamo un appuntamento nel nuovo bar.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在新开的咖啡馆有个约会。
translations.yue: 我哋喺新開嘅咖啡店有個約會。
translations.ru: У нас свидание в новом кафе.
translations.pt: Temos um encontro no café novo.
translations.he: יש לנו דייט בבית הקפה החדש.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi có buổi hẹn ở quán cà phê mới.
translations.nl: We hebben een date in het nieuwe café.
translations.uk: У нас побачення в новому кафе.
translations.hi: हमारी डेट नए कैफ़े में है।
translations.nb: Vi har en date på den nye kafeen.
translations.id: Kita punya kencan di kafe baru.
translations.sv: Vi har en dejt på det nya kaféet.
translations.ro: Avem o întâlnire la noua cafenea.
translations.da: Vi har en date på den nye café.
translations.ja: 私たちは新しいカフェでデートします。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person plural nominative personal pronoun functioning as subject.
Finite main verb (1st pl, present indicative) selecting a direct object.
Indefinite article; feminine accusative singular agreeing with the noun.
Common noun; feminine accusative singular functioning as direct object.
Contraction of ‘in dem’; preposition governing dative, introducing a prepositional phrase.
Attributive adjective; dative singular (weak declension) agreeing with ‘Café’.
Common noun; neuter dative singular as object of the preposition ‘im’.
